name: Breaching Axe
description:
This model gains the following ability:

Breaching Charge: This model's Charge action may generate the Slam action.

This model gains the following action:

granted_abilities.name: Breaching Charge
granted_abilities.text: This model's Charge action may generate the Slam action.

granted_actions.name: Breaching Axe
granted_actions.effects: This model may remove one marker or piece of destructible terrain within range.

triggers.name: Piercing
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (warding) abilities.

extraction_notes: The Piercing trigger shows (m) icon and Warding defensive icon (shield) in its text.
The "I'm Out!" trigger has a crow (c) icon and includes mandatory language indicating it must be declared if able.
